diagrams.title: Type Promotion Hierarchy Pyramid
diagrams.description: Visual representation of widening conversion order from smallest to largest type
diagrams.purpose: Remember the order: B → S → I → L → F → D. Shows that types lower in pyramid automatically promote to types above.

diagrams.title: Binary Numeric Promotion Flowchart
diagrams.description: Decision diagram showing how Java determines result type when two operands have different types
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the decision process Java compiler uses for type promotion in binary operations.

diagrams.title: Unary Numeric Promotion Example
diagrams.description: Diagram showing how unary operators affect byte, short, and char types
elements: Step 3: int cannot fit in byte → Error
diagrams.purpose: Shows why byte/short operations need casting after unary operations.

diagrams.title: ASCII Value Reference for Char Promotion
diagrams.description: Reference table showing how char values are represented as int in arithmetic
diagrams.purpose: Understanding char promotion to int requires knowing ASCII values - helps predict arithmetic results with characters.
